claude-subagent.description: Native Claude Code subagent — spawned via Agent tool within the session
claude-subagent.model_selection: Inherits the session model. Change with /model opus|sonnet|haiku in Claude Code before dispatching.
claude-subagent.isolation: none by default — runs in main worktree

gemini-worker.isolation: worktree per task (isolation: worktree in agent definition)

codex-worker.isolation: worktree per task (isolation: worktree in agent definition)
codex-worker.concurrency_note: JSON-RPC broker queues — one active Codex request at a time

vn-reviewer.memory: project — accumulates codebase knowledge across sessions
